---
title: "About"
image: newprofile.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/jiayi-alan-chen-a716371a2/
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/cjy-2001
---

Hi! I'm Jiayi Chen, a senior majoring in Mathematics and Computer Science at Middlebury College. I'm interested in Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Machine Learning.
